name: Spanish Studies
note: Grade of C (2.0) or higher required in all courses. Elementary Spanish (SPA-115/125), Spanish Review and Preparation (SPA-135), and Intermediate Spanish (SPA-215/225) do not count. Interdisciplinary courses must be departmentally approved and show internal coherence and relevance to Spanish coursework. Application for approval by Spring of junior year.

sections.label: Four Spanish Courses Beyond SPA-225
sections.description: Four courses in Spanish beyond Intermediate Spanish II (SPA-225). Hispanic Life and Culture (SPA-336/-338) recommended as one of the four.

sections.label: Five Departmentally Approved Interdisciplinary Courses
sections.description: Five courses from a departmentally approved list proposed by the student, exhibiting internal coherence and relevance to Spanish coursework.
